## Summary

What does this PR change and why?

## Validation

- [ ] `bash -n codesign-workshop.sh` passes
- [ ] `shellcheck codesign-workshop.sh` is clean (or warnings explained)
- [ ] Manually ran the affected step(s)

## Checklist

- [ ] No hardcoded identities, keys, tenants, labels, or other static data
- [ ] No secrets or customer data in the diff
- [ ] User-facing strings are bilingual (pt/es) via the `t` helper
- [ ] ASCII diagrams stay aligned (no translated text inside boxes)
- [ ] Updated `README.md` / `docs/` / `CHANGELOG.md` if behavior changed
